commands.review_summary:
The branch adds channel-inbound/channel-outbound SDK surfaces, migrates bundled channel imports and docs, moves streaming/direct-DM helpers under core channels, adds deprecated-subpath guards, and updates Node/pnpm CI setup.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: v2026.5.22 exposes the removed SDK/runtime names, while PR head removes or renames them, and the Signal empty-quote metadata loss is visible in the current branch source path.
